title: Snow Settings
description:
Customise which blocks snow can land on, and toggle snow melting next to torches.
Part of the Murf Tweaks package mod.
body:
**Snow Settings allows for snow-based customisation, including specifying which blocks snowfall can land on as well as whether or not snow will melt near light sources**

The murf-tweaks:allows_snowfall and murf-tweaks:prevents_snowfall block tags can be used to customise the mod behaviour in a datapack. By default, snow, grass and leaves can be snowed on.

The gamerule murf-tweaks:do_snow_melting allows melting snow near light sources to be enabled or disabled.

The mod is designed to work entirely server-side.

[![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/T6T61T1SK5)

![Murf Tweaks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7aa317020f29ec30acd5a1b23b42b37f5843873f.png)
